title: morus alba subvar. pumila
intro: Morus alba subvar. pumila, also known as the dwarf white mulberry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Moraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Morus alba subvar. pumila include reducing inflammation and improving blood circulation, as well as being used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used to make traditional medicines in the form of powder or capsules.
